title: lophopyrum elongatum
intro: Lophopyrum elongatum, also known as Indian ricegrass or Chinese wild rice, is a perennial grass native to Asia and parts of Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Lophopyrum elongatum include reducing inflammation and oxidative stress, as well as improving immune function and cardiovascular health. Lophopyrum elongatum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to make medicinal wines and other preparations.
